Why careful measurements matter

The experiment began with a simple observation, but confirming it required several independent measurements and a careful comparison with the original prediction.

After checking the instruments, the researchers repeated the procedure and found the same pattern. That result is the central conclusion of the article.

2 Responses to “Why careful measurements matter”

  1. Ada's comment says that the independent check makes the conclusion especially convincing.

    Reply

  2. Ben's comment asks whether the instruments were calibrated again after the final trial.

    Reply
